value.fullName: Renewal more than 7 days late, incl. extension & backdating
value.label: Renewal more than 7 days late, incl. extension & backdating

value.fullName: Account transitioned 90 days prior to renewal due to a rep leaving the company
value.label: Account transitioned 90 days prior to renewal due to a rep leaving the company

value.fullName: The purchased product is no longer supported
value.label: The purchased product is no longer supported

value.fullName: Other - All other churn protection requests outside of this list - must go through special approval process
value.label: Other - All other churn protection requests outside of this list - must go through special approval process

value.fullName: Accounts transitioned to the rep less than 90 days prior renewal date
value.label: Accounts transitioned to the rep less than 90 days prior renewal date

value.fullName: Merges (in cases where there was no loss of ARR)
value.label: Merges (in cases where there was no loss of ARR)

value.fullName: Product Change - Small Sites / Popular Pages
value.label: Product Change - Small Sites / Popular Pages

value.fullName: Renewals 7+ days late, including extension and backdated contract
value.label: Renewals 7+ days late, including extension and backdated contract
